user_query: I am planning a trip from London to Zurich on June 1st. Could you provide me with the departure and arrival information for this route, including the scheduled departure and arrival times? Moreover, I would like to know the average gas prices in Zurich and London during that time.

TaskList.description: Retrieve transportation options from London to Zurich, including scheduled departure and arrival times.
Fetch average gas prices in Zurich for the specified date.
Fetch average gas prices in London for the specified date.
